insight_text: Customers show moderate-positive satisfaction, but low-rating shares indicate improvement is still required.
evidence_note: Survey result: mean rating 3.59/5, top-two-box 59.7%, low ratings 18.4%, n=347.

insight_text: The AI claims all customers are fully satisfied and no improvement is needed.
evidence_note: Requires validation because the claim overstates the survey evidence.

insight_text: Open-ended comments suggest delivery timelines may need further qualitative coding before client reporting.
evidence_note: Open-ended comments mention delivery, issues, time, resources, and timelines, but comments have not yet been formally coded.
